Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs records, [ca.1875]-1998.
Collection Number: 21-3-1304

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs records, [ca.1875]-1998.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
21-3-1304
Abstract:
Includes surveys of graduates and records of the Cornell Office of Resident Instruction.
Creator:
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs
Quanitities:
15 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY

Prior to 1988, the office was known as Office of Resident Instruction. As of 1988, the name has been changed to the Office of Academic Programs.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Includes surveys of graduates and records of the Cornell Office of Resident Instruction.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs records, #21-3-1304. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:

Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
SUBJECTS

Names:
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Resident Instruction
Cornell University -- : Administration.
Cornell University -- : Admission.
Cornell University -- : Students.
Subjects:
Agriculture -- Societies.
